response.justification: Bogdan is a technically broad and experienced full-stack engineer with genuine depth in distributed systems and a founder background, meeting the 15-year experience floor. However, the role is fundamentally an AI strategy and advisory IC at director level, and his AI exposure is limited to a few months in his current role building MCP tooling — there is no demonstrated track record of AI products, platforms, or strategic advisory work that this position requires. The seniority and scope gap is significant.
strengths: 16+ years of polyglot, cross-domain engineering experience including high-throughput distributed systems
Founder and open-source platform builder (GISCollective) demonstrating entrepreneurial and independent delivery capability
Active knowledge-sharer through public talks and workshops, which aligns with the internal/external inspiration aspect of the role
concerns: AI expertise is nascent — current role is the first AI-adjacent work and spans only ~2 months, far short of the demonstrated AI product/platform depth the role requires
No evidence of director-level IC influence, strategic customer advisory, or cross-organizational technical leadership expected at this seniority
No graduate degree in an AI-related field and no cloud platform architecture experience at scale, both listed as strong preferences

key_factors.factor: Broad distributed systems and founder experience
